programme.title: Kandahar
programme.desc: Suryanath, an unemployed pilot, gets inspired by Major Mahadevan to join the Indian Army. Soon, while travelling to Kandahar with his team, their flight gets hijacked. Now Suryanath must rise to the occasion to save the hostages along with his team.

programme.title: Aarakshan
programme.desc: The controversial policy of caste-based reservations in government jobs and educational institutions in India leads to a conflict between a teacher hailing from a lower class, his good friend belonging to the upper caste, and his mentor.

programme.title: Welcome
programme.desc: Two thugs want their sister to get married. They find a suitable match, but the groom's uncle wants him to get married to a girl from a decent family. The only way they can get married is, if both the dons give up their life of crime.

programme.title: Shoorveer
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Ricky Bhai Yash
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Jaanbaaz Commando
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Maayon
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Dandelion
programme.desc: Two of the most prosperous families in town – the Adrianovs and the Zeldovs - are preparing for the marriage of their children, an advantageous match and a union that promises to benefit both families' business interests. The day before the wedding celebrations are due to commence, the groom, Rodion Andrianov, meets a plain ‘dandelion' blonde girl Sonia under unusual circumstances when the elevator in which they are both traveling suddenly breaks down.

programme.title: Terror Of Hallow'S Eve
programme.desc: After a fifteen-year-old is brutally beaten up by High School bullies, his wish for revenge unknowingly unleashes the Terror of Halloween.

programme.title: Ouija House
programme.desc: A girl takes her friends to a house with a dark past for a research project. They unwittingly summon an evil entity with plans of its own who makes the house part of its sinister game.

programme.title: Personal Interest
programme.desc: Tatiana makes her escape from prison and seeks a hideout in a remote village of Pavlovka, in her late grandmother's house. There she meets Maxim who has come to the village to take a break from the hectic city life. Instant chemistry sparks between them. Everything would be just fine were it not for Tatiana's ex-boyfriend, Oleg, who comes to the village looking for her. Tatiana is forced to tell Maxim the whole truth about herself. She tells him about the robbery she committed together with Oleg and how she took all the blame on herself and then escaped from prison. Maxim assures her that he will be by her side no matter what and will help her get through all this.

programme.title: If You Only Knew
programme.desc: A romantic comedy about a young man who pretends to be gay in order to rent an apartment with his dream girl.

programme.title: Lady Gaga: Encore
programme.desc: Gaga has travelled through time with her ever changing sound, reinventing herself for every album.

programme.title: Britney Spears: Unbreakable
programme.desc: Look into the glamorous and tumultuous life of pop sensation Britney Spears.

programme.title: Beyonce: Beyond the Glam
programme.desc: Beyonce is a true global mega star and is synonymous with talent and success.

programme.title: Liar
programme.desc: A well-dressed man, John is in a dingy interrogation room being given a lie detector test by detectives.

programme.title: Lady Gaga: Encore
programme.desc: Gaga has travelled through time with her ever changing sound, reinventing herself for every album.

programme.title: Ten Soldiers of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: This epic actioner features the relentless brave warriors from Genghis Khan's ten soldiers, as they are sent into the woods on a dangerous mission that will put the band of Mongol warriors on the edge of life and death.

programme.title: Derailed
programme.desc: Four teenagers running away from home get more than they bargained for when they lure a man to a motel to rob him.

programme.title: Shift
programme.desc: After meeting a mysterious stranger, a man must escape a dystopian world to return to his wife.

programme.title: In The Cage
programme.desc: Marvin Fields is caught up with challenges and obstacles. On the verge of losing his family, he has to step up and face his adversaries. Marvin tries different avenues to help eliminate these difficulties, but his efforts are futile. Now, he decides to take desperate measures in saving his family and finances. When hell breaks loose and nothing seems to work, a true character is revealed through Marvin. Later on, Marvin discovers martial arts through his best friend Frank Biggs. This martial art will help Marvin find himself again and give him a sense of purpose. As he continues to search deeper his new found art, his troubles aren't stagnant. Marvin still has to wake up and face the demons of his life. Marvin has got to get his life out of this never diminishing cage and find freedom. In the meantime, Claire Fields (Marvin's wife) is fed up and tired of supporting the family. Marvin's cage seems invisible to Claire, and this continues to trigger his frustration. In the end, true love and friendship will be revealed and seem to help break down the barriers around this mysterious cage.

programme.title: Parwana
programme.desc: Parwana spends his days brightening the lives of the downtrodden with a series of odd jobs. Just as Parwana falls in love and marries the girl of his dreams, a group of vicious criminals label him a traitor and Parwana is thrown behind bars. Despite the mafia's best attempts to permanently silent Parwana as he languishes in jail, the daring hero escapes and sets out on a mission to clear his name and expose the real criminals.

programme.title: Kitne Door Kitne Paas
programme.desc: After studying in New York City, Jatin (Fardeen Khan) is returning home to India, where he's set to marry a woman from his hometown. On his flight to Delhi, he meets Karishma (Amrita Arora), coincidentally on her way to her own marriage, and her quick temper instantly sets them at odds. Once in Delhi, the unlikely travel companions find their connecting flight has been cancelled, so Jatin and Karishma must share a long bus ride to Gujarat, discovering each other and themselves in the process.

programme.title: Mangal Pandey (The Rising)
programme.desc: It is the year 1857. The British are plundering the resources of their Indian subjects, who have reached their breaking point. Soldier Mangal Pandey (Aamir Khan) leads an uprising against India's imperialist occupiers -- events the British call a mutiny and the Indians call a war for independence. Throughout the violent events, Mangal maintains a friendship with Capt. William Gordon (Toby Stephens), who sympathizes with India's subjugated citizens and obeys his conscience.

programme.title: Do Chutki Sindoor
programme.desc: Vinayak and Siddhi live in Agra and Siddhi has a sister named Maya, who has a mental capacity of a 9-year-old. Siddhi takes full responsibility of Maya and ensures she is never left alone. Sunaina, their stepmother worries about Maya. Siddhi assures Sunaina that she will not marry until she finds someone who will take care of Maya. On the other hand, Vinayak who is the only son of rich and famous Jayadevi, a shrewd woman who despises the colour black. Vinayak and Siddhi's paths cross when Maya is about to get hit by Vinayak's car. Siddhi intervenes and saves Maya, but in anger slaps Vinayak for calling Maya "Pagal" (crazy). Vinayak realizes that he has fallen for Siddhi and promises to take care of Maya and marries Siddhi to seek revenge and make Maya suffer.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This Story Is About A 19Year Old Girl Named Chunari, Who Dreams Of Marriage And A Happy Family. However, She Becomes Entangled In The Chains Of Deceit, Finding Herself On The Path To Becoming A Dahej Daasi, Which Is A Tradition Still Prevalent In The Backward Regions Of Rajasthan. The Show Unfolds Into A Compelling Drama Of Tradition Versus Rebellion, Love Versus Oppression.

programme.title: Agni Vayu
programme.desc: Agni Vayu Is A Romantic Thriller That Tells The Story Of A Young, Vibrant Dr. Agni And An Ambitious Investment Banker Vayu. As Their Love Blossoms, An Unfortunate Turn Of Events Happens That Throws Them Amid Conspiracy, Misunderstanding, Swindling, And All Sorts Of Paradoxes At Every Turn. They Set Out On A Journey To Unravel The Mystery Surrounding These Events. Can They Both Solve It Together And Will They Disclose Their Feelings To Each Other During The Journey.

programme.title: Freaky Furry
programme.desc: When a freak accident causes Angie to switch bodies with her dog, Skeezer falls hard for the new Angie while the old Angie goes rabid with frustration.

programme.title: Nanobots Byte
programme.desc: When Angie's garbage-eating nanobots escape from the lab, the Secret Lab Kids must stop them before they turn the planet into one giant feeding ground.

programme.title: The Monster Not Under the Bed
programme.desc: The Secret Lab Kids shrink themselves to microscopic proportions in order to prove to Joelle that there are no monsters hiding under her bed. They just didn't count on all the other microscopic creatures.

programme.title: Amusement park
programme.desc: ," Jane and Jerry _hinage in a playful dance-off, constantly trying to one-up each other. Their antics escalate as they use various props to outdo the other, leading to a comical series of mishaps. However, when their beloved music player breaks, they realize the power of their shared passion for music and come together to create their own joyful tune, ending on a heartwarming note of friendship and celebration.

programme.title: Domino's Effect
programme.desc: In their imaginative world, Jerry transforms into a baby superhero, emulating heroic actions and surprising Jane with his playful antics. Jerry's mischievousness leads to both laughter and chall_hines as he playfully interrupts Jane's daily activities. However, when faced with a real threat in the form of a cockroach, Jerry's true superhero nature emerges, and he comes to Jane's rescue. With their bond str_hinthened, Jane rewards Jerry with a real superhero cape, acknowledging his extraordinary spirit. Together, they triumph over obstacles and celebrate their super-powered adventures.

programme.title: Drone Attack
programme.desc: Jerry's mischievous behavior leads to a mess of toys and books scattered around the living room. Jane tries to catch the thrown objects but ends up getting hit herself. However, Jerry realizes Jane's sadness and starts helping her collect the items. They work together, with Jerry attempting to balance a pile of books and Jane using a box to collect the toys. After some mishaps, they successfully gather everyt_hing, but when the box breaks, they find themselves buried under the pile. They laugh together, realizing the joy in their shared experience.

programme.desc: Jerry grows into a giant after wearing a special ring gadget. Jane tries to evade him but is eventually captured and carried around like a toy. She manages to escape by using the ring to shrink Jerry back to his normal size. They reconcile, and Jane playfully throws the ring away, bringing an end to their giant-sized adventure.

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: is a lively and comedic story of Jerry's birthday celebration. Jane surprises Jerry with a cake, but playfully keeps it out of his reach, leading to a chase around the house. Amidst the chaos, the cake ends up on the fan, creating further obstacles. Jerry and Jane search desperately for the cake, leading to a comical scene of mistaken discoveries. As the clock strikes midnight, signaling the end of Jerry's birthday, they become disheartened. However, a spontaneous cake mishap involving the fan brings laughter and joy to both characters, turning the situation into a hilarious and memorable moment

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 11
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It' s a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It' s a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It' s countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer' s back is turned.

programme.title: Cutie Cubies
programme.desc: An animation series about the adventures of four aliens - Cubies: Captain, Boatswain, Navigator, and Doctor. Having arrived on our planet and disguised as representatives of the local flora and fauna of the cubic form: a yellow chicken, a red rabbit, a blue aquarium and a bush of green grass, they are learning the diverse phenomena of our planet Earth.

programme.title: Monsuno
programme.desc: The series revolves around re-awakened Monster DNA, called Monsuno, that finds its way into the unsuspecting hands of adventure-seeking teenagers Chase, Jinja, and Bren. Accompanied by their Monsuno, Lock, Charger, and Quickforce, they are searching for Chase' s father Jeredy Suno, the creator of the Monsuno

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here.

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Woodventures
programme.desc: " Woodventures" is an animated series for preschool children. The main characters are wooden toys: Kitty Meow, Doggy Woof-Woof, Piggy Oink, Horsey Yee-Ho-Ho and Elephant Pawoo. The toys live in a small wooden town (the prototype of a child' s play room). Every toy has its own unique personality and reacts to different circumstances appropriately. With the help of the invisible narrator, the toys, along with the audience solve different tasks, play and take part in adventures. " Woodventures" is a musical series with lots of songs and dances. Some of the songs represent our characters and appear in each series, and some of the songs are related to the events in the series, so it is only found in that particular episode.Each episode presents a playful and learning environment.

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Jungle Book Ep 47
programme.desc: This story is about, " The adventures of Mowgli, an orphan boy raised by wolves, and his friends in the jungle." Young Mowglu and his animal friends, Bagheera and Baloo, adventur together in the wilderness.

programme.title: Kungfu Master Of Zodiac Ep 46
programme.desc: Welcome to 12 Zodiac Way! This is a story of the twelve animals of the Chinese Zodiac like you've never seen them before! programme.title: Fix & Foxi Show
programme.desc: Prof. Knox's new invention is to be tested on F&F: an electronic babysitter - F&F feel too old for such a thing / Everyone flies their kites. Lupo cuts up and gets into trouble when his Rie-sendrachen pulls him into the air... / F&F can earn a few pennies by cleaning out Uncle Fax's garage, but unfortunately they also sell a vase that Fax needs and Grandma Eusebia has bought... / Lucky has broken a leg sits bored at his "window to the yard" and suddenly observes terrible things at his neighbor Old Snotty. One by one he sends his family over, but no one comes back. Lucky is overcome with panic.

programme.title: Gloria s House
programme.desc: Gloria's school urgently needs money. To this end, the children are asked to sell chocolate. Gloria brings home several boxes of chocolate. But Beat can't help himself and devours the chocolate...

programme.title: Mission Odyssey
programme.desc: The goblins go on the attack. The elves are desperate. Colonel Daiman, plagued by a guilty conscience, comes to their aid at the last second...

programme.title: Marvellous Milly
programme.desc: When Milly wakes up at night, she is terrified of the storm. The curtains in her room have taken on strange shapes and she suddenly fears that curtain monsters are hiding behind them. To be on the safe side, she has to pull the curtain back somehow. So she invents a "fear repeller" to help her pull back the curtains. When she finally succeeds, she discovers that Black Cat has hidden behind the curtain with her friends. So Milly no longer has any reason to be afraid of the storm.

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: The Da Boom Crew has landed in a remote desert town inhabited by rather strange-looking aliens. The aliens ask the kids to ask the Great Protector for help...

programme.title: Adventurers Masters of Time
programme.desc: Krupnik, Fire, Nevin and Gaius fall into the hacker's trap.

programme.title: Bob's Beach
programme.desc: An evil professor launches Operation Saturn! He captures Bob to shoot him onto Saturn with a rocket. Bob's friends must prevent this at all costs...

programme.title: Gloria s House
programme.desc: It's project day at school. The task is to start an advertising campaign in pairs. Gloria comes up with the idea of advertising her father's handicrafts. She designs brochures and distributes them...

programme.title: Shadow of the Elves
programme.desc: Snakehammer of all people, the ingenious goblin inventor, loses his memory by a stupid accident. When he wakes up from his unconsciousness, he finds himself among the trolls...

programme.title: Fix & Foxi Show

programme.title: Crocadoo
programme.desc: The hotel owner Hartacker rallies the population against the crocodiles. He claims that the animals have killed a boy. But he himself is hiding the child. At first, the campaign is successful...

programme.title: Marvellous Milly
programme.desc: Milly wants to surprise her father with a cake for his birthday. But while she is trying to mix the batter, the mixer gives up the ghost. But that's no reason for Milly to give up. She repairs the mixer and gives it to her father for his birthday along with the birthday cake. No wonder her father is delighted,

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: In search of the next Boom Cart, the kids land on the planet Gaffa. But immediately after landing, they are attacked by vicious Larvites...

programme.title: Adventurers Masters of Time
programme.desc: Our four heroes make their way to Paul Revere.

programme.title: Bob's Beach
programme.desc: Hurakan is holding Mara Mei captive. The chief is not to see her again until he agrees to her marriage! Bob and his friends must free Mara Mei...

programme.title: WONDER BOX
programme.desc: Wonder Box invites young viewers inside a magical miniature world. This exciting box has many doors, windows and drawers in various shapes, sizes and colors.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the GTR, Nissan tried to take on the established European sports car manufacturers. For less than half the price the GTR was a more affordable direct competitor to Porsche's 911 Turbo S or the Audi R8 GT. In addition: one of the ultimate super cars, the Techart 911 Turbo S with 620 hp. And: the Pagani Huayra, presented and driven by Formula 1 Pilot Adrian Sutil.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: It's not always a car's pure power that makes driving through curves exciting. The Subaru BRZ with its low boxer engine and its well-balanced handling gives his driver a very good feeling for the road. The BMW 235i RS has a great rear wheel performance and the Porsche Cayman GTS with its mid-engine puts a smile on your face as soon as you put your foot on the accelerator.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the creation of its i8, Munich-based car manufacturer BMW makes a big step towards the future. After all, the futuristic looking car is the first German sports car which utilizes hybrid technology. Supercars checks out the BMW i8 on the streets of Los Angeles. But BMW did not just work on the i8. They also present the new sports coupe 435i and the sporty SUV X550d M.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: If you have only sat in the back of a big limousine and if you don't know how much these kind of limousines are, you are probably part of the management. When it comes to driving experience and performance, it makes sense that the driver¿s seat is less attractive. But that's only the case for seasoned state cars anyways. The Audi RS and Mercedes S-Class might even make some chauffeurs unemployed.

programme.desc: Rene and Casey take a gamble in San Bernardino, and Kenny stumbles over some car parts.

programme.title: Wonders of Men
programme.desc: Jama Masjid is a historical landmark that showcases the pride of early architecture.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick gets his hands on a Bricklin while Chum hesitates to take a huge deal.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: San Bernardino brings out the warrior in Ivy, who goes up against an upstart buyer.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jennifer Brennan attempts to drive a decked-out armored assault vehicle to its buyer.

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: Indipedia
programme.desc: A light and peppy anchor driven half-hour episodic series that explores the reasons, bellefs and logic behind the customs and rituals observed as a norm In India, often so casually that most of us have never really asked why they arethe way they are.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: Eco India
programme.desc: Eco india challenges natural conflicts with inter-human solutions as they reflect sustaining self and surrounding. From “Changing Flora and Fauna”, Urban Visions being Sustainable”, “Greening Up- creating solutions for greenhouse and global warming” leading us to know how we could “Help Nature, Help Humanity”. As they go head on with “Protecting Seafood and ocean life”, “Addressing industrial Pollution” , land pollution , water pollution , modern solutions to hazardous pollutants, tackling food and water shortage , Recycling batteries, sustainable ways of life , protecting environment with modern and technological development issues and many more to create a better world.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: At the zoo and the New York Aquarium, bull sea lions Clyde and Tacoma trade places to meet a new set of girlfriends Sifaka lemurs Gemina and Andri form a new breeding pair to help their species.

programme.desc: How the open boarders of India link to country's large crime rate.

programme.title: Border Control
programme.desc: In Adolfo Suárez International Airport, a bodybuilder coming from South America attempts to smuggle in anabolic steroids and artificial stimulants.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Storm Surge
programme.desc: Captains take on the steepest waves yet in an epic final surge to hit their quotas Jake fights through a debilitating crew injury on deck Josh gambles big on his crab count engine failure leaves Sig dead in the water.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: The Value of Misfits
programme.desc: The Misfits give it all they've got to prove their worth in the mine fields of South Australia. The Bishop loses his prized claim to competitors while the Tunnel Rats risk electrocution while operating their digger.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Gold, The Bad, & The Ugly
programme.desc: Shawn's rocky pay streak takes him for a wild ride Vernon loses patience with his crew's performance.

programme.title: Ballroom Blitz: Desert Classic Dancesport
programme.desc: Rose works overtime to dance Jan is out to prove that injury and divorce won't stop her winning.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Host/adventurer George Kourounis explores the American Southwest during the Desert Monsoon. He ups the danger factor by traveling with wild atheist shock-jock R.J. Evans to track massive lightning storms which can produce bolts of up to one hundred million volts. The pair come close - too close - to dangerous electrical clouds swirling over Tucson, Sedona and Monument Valley.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: The most notorious volcanic explosion in history came from the small island of Krakatoa, off the coast of Java, The tiny island was pulverized and the giant explosion was felt half way around the world. Java is at the heart of the Ring of Fire, and so has seen many volcanoes, mud slides and earthquakes through its long history.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: The Angry Planet team heads to Africa to climb the steep and very active Nyiragongo Volcano in the Congo that erupted in 2002, sending 125,000 people fleeing for their lives. Host/adventurer George Kourounis explores the bubbling lake of molten lava and investigates the risk the dangerous volcano poses to both the people of city of Goma and the Mountain Gorillas who live on the nearby jungle slopes.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Ground Zero for host/adventurer George Kourounis stormchasing is Oklahoma City, capital of North Americas Tornado Alley. George tracks a building storm that threatens that tough mid-western city, chases a hail storm, fights to get in the middle of a vicious dust-devil and the funky roadside Americana of the American Midwest.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: In June of next year we plan to intercept the Monsoon as it hits southern India and makes its way north along the western shore past Goa and Mumbai up to Delhi.This most famous of torrential rainy seasons drops as much as 40 feet of water on parts of the parched sub-continent.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: With summer wildfires overpowering the Yukon forests, host/adventurer George Kourounis follows the fabled route of the Klondike Gold Rush sourdoughs through the bawdy town of Skagway, Alaska, paddling the white water rivers and the White Horse Rapids into the Yukon. He travels on mountain bike, steam train and Cessna to experience the huge fires and meet the northern fire crews battling the blazes.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Tornadoes they are the embodiment of severe weather. In this episode we show some of the most terrifying weather caught on camera from surviving a direct hit to a tornado in a typhoon.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: El Niño is a temperature anomaly in the Pacific Ocean that affects weather patterns around the globe. In this episode we show some of the costly and deadly weather that can result when a Super El Niño occurs.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Volcanic ash engulfing a town, a massive firenado in California - just some of the viral weather videos caught on camera in this episode of Captured, as Vicious Winds take center stage.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: A catastrophic earthquake, a mesmerizing avalanche, a destructive tornado, and an unintentional smashup derby on icy highways our experts weigh in on these viral videos as people get caught off guard by the sudden and powerful forces of nature.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Humans are inclined to take the natural element of water for granted until they witness its relentless power and destructive capabilities.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: A narrow escape from a raging wildfire – a dramatic encounter with a mudslide - the jaw-dropping images of a flash flood – just some of the encounters with two of nature's most destructive forces caught on camera in this Fire and Water episode.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: El Niño is a temperature anomaly in the Pacific Ocean that affects weather patterns around the globe. In this episode we show some of the costly and deadly weather that can result when a Super El Niño occurs.

programme.title: Trajectory
programme.desc: PROJECT GEMINI COMMENCES - Did Gemini give the US a lead in the space race? VENUS EXPRESS - The last days of ESA's Venus probe. EMU NASA's - Extravehicular Mobility Unit. DEEP SPACE COMMUNICATIONS - ESA's worldwide network of giant dishes.

programme.title: Trajectory
programme.desc: PROJECT GEMINI ADVANCES - NASA refines the techniques needed for rendezvous. CASSINI AT SATURN - In the Cassini probe's final years of activity, its handlers are asking it to do more complex and risky assignments.

programme.title: Trajectory
programme.desc: PROJECT GEMINI DOCKING AND EVA - In the final phase of the Gemini program NASA struggles with docking and spacewalks. CURIOUSITY ROVING MARS - On the surface of Mars the Curiousity rover is changing the way we think about the red planet.

programme.title: The Re-Inventors
programme.desc: It looks like a doghouse resting on a wet suit, but this 1916 invention could have savez countless lives lost at sea.

programme.title: The Re-Inventors
programme.desc: Personal fire escape for people trapped in buildings, that must work. Will it save your life or not? Let's see.

programme.title: The Re-Inventors
programme.desc: A steel helmet with an air-power-triggered gun welded to the top. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Space Greed
programme.desc: Space is home to crucial resources, important discoveries, and big potential profit.

programme.title: Space Greed
programme.sub-title: Sol Ownership: Can A Corporation Own The Sun?
programme.desc: Human needs have always created opportunities for human greed. And energy might be the most crucial need of all. Could we end up paying a subscription fee for sunlight?

programme.title: Space Greed
programme.sub-title: Terraforming: Can We Build A Planet B?
programme.desc: Once we've managed to get a handle on building structures to help us live on the harsh, dangerous surfaces of other celestial bodies -- why stop there?

programme.title: Unearth
programme.desc: We look closely at the search within our solar system, Mars, Titan and the ice moons. Speaking with experts in their fields of Mars robotic missions, Nuclear scientists probing the structure of ice on the distant moons.

programme.title: Unearth
programme.desc: Experts explain our history and evolution of Earth over its 4 billion year history and take us through to the current emergency where humans may be one of the species to become extinct.

programme.title: Unearth
programme.desc: Hollywood has made us rather fearful of Artificial Intelligence, or A.I. But as we shall see, A.I. and its dance partner robotics might not be the nemesis we should fear at least, not if we get them right.

programme.title: Monkey Thieves
programme.desc: Rani's troop burgles a house to find food, a surprised Zamir finds himself in a tangle with a truck and there is a dangerous rise in the number of monkey catchers.

programme.title: Monkey Thieves
programme.desc: The Galta Gang get on the wrong side of the law and Esha turns a tailor's world upside down. A truck arrives in the city carrying an unexpected stowaway. Galta Gang renegade Zamir is back in Jaipur.

programme.title: Echo And The Elephants Of Amboseli
programme.desc: In Amboseli, the harsh drought is tightening its grip. Echo and all the elephant families go to sleep and wake up hungry. Rain is falling, but in dangerous areas, drawing elephants into increasing conflict with farmers.

programme.title: Echo And The Elephants Of Amboseli
programme.desc: On the plains of Amboseli, the rains are two months late. Echo brings the family to the palms to eat the last leaves. The wise matriarch resists the temptation to take them to inhabited areas where fresh crops are springing up and conflict waits.

programme.title: Echo And The Elephants Of Amboseli
programme.desc: In the relentless drought, the youngest calves are starving. Hunger is driving elephants to forage on surrounding farms. Echo's keeps her family to the swamp. Rains arrive, but after five days, the much-needed downpours dwindle to sparse showers.

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: The baboon human conflict in the western cape has taken an ugly turn with many of the cape peninsulas chacmas either being trapped and relocated or killed. Swati walks with baboons to find out what is causing this conflict and to look for solutions

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Can wilderness be brought back to a land that has been overgrazed and farmed? The Karoo was once extensive across south Africa and home to a rich diversity of flora and fauna. Swati takes a wild walk there to see if the conservation plan is working

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Can captive bred ambassador cheetahs of the Cheetah Outreach in Cape Town can help save their counterparts in the wild? Swati finds out if the motto of Cheetah Outreach, see it, Sense it, Save it, can help the wild cheetah?

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: The orphanage is full. Cramped for space, the Hooligans inevitably begin to fight and Kalula is always in the thick of it. Karen travels to Kwa-Zulu Natal to inspect a new rhino orphanage, all part of her dream to create little ‘pockets of hope'.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: The Rhino Orphanage receives a call for help, a calf was stuck in mud for three days, abandoned and unable to walk. Then Karen rushes to a rhino that may need to be euthanized and is possibly pregnant!

programme.title: Ant Anstead Master Mechanic

programme.title: Vicky Goes Veg
programme.desc: Vicky goes green in this series. He stirs up a vegetarian gourmet extravaganza and serves it with a side of his usual humour.

programme.title: Lock Stock And Two Smoking Tikkas
programme.desc: Marut Sikka knows authentic Indian flavours like nobody else. From Kashmir to Kanyakumari, and West Bengal to Gujarat, he delves into the secrets of each region and brings out its special flavours.

programme.title: The Trinity Cathedral, Saint Petersburg, Russia
programme.desc: Spread out on the coast of the Gulf of Finland, at the mouth of the Neva River, St. Petersburg is the second-largest city in Russia. Witness of both military and civil history, the Trinity Cathedral of Izmailovsky, part of the historic center of St. Peter"&"sburg is a world heritage site.

programme.title: Novi Sad Synagogue, Serbia
programme.desc: Right in the city center of Novi Sad, Serbia, this crucial area, on Jevrejska Street – literally, Jewish Street - the synagogue of Novi Sad occupies a prominent spot both geographically as well as in the historical annals of the city.

programme.title: Mar Elias Monastery
programme.desc: Mar Elias monastery lies on the side of the road from Jerusalem and Bethlehem. It is maintained by the Greek-Orthodox church, and by local tradition Elijah rested here while fleeing from Queen Jezebel

programme.title: City of Venice, Italy (Part 2)
programme.desc: Celebrated throughout the world for its singular beauty, discover Venice and some of its famous places. An open-air museum that seems to float on its lagoon, and a World Heritage Site.

programme.title: Village Baduy, Indonesia
programme.desc: The Baduy village is in a remote area on the slopes of the Kendeng Mountains, surrounded by a verdant atmosphere. It retains the ancient cultural values and still maintains its traditional style while rejecting the technology that has changed everything.

programme.title: Sifnos, Cyclades island, Greece
programme.desc: An elegant island, symbolic of the Cyclades, discover the Greek island of Sifnos, full of contrasts, where the most arid mountains rub shoulders with the greenest valleys, and where monasteries dominate sandy beaches.

programme.title: Vannes Old City, France
programme.desc: Old City Walls of Vannes are fortifications built between the 3rd and 17th centuries to protect Vannes' city. It is located on the Gulf of Morbihan at the mouth of two rivers, the Marle and the Vincin, around 450 km southwest of Paris. These ancient city walls are some of the best-preserved in the country.

programme.title: Tallinn town, Estonia
programme.desc: Entering now in the Old Town of Tallinn, we understand how it became the best-preserved medieval city in Northern Europe, boasting Gothic spires, winding cobblestone streets, and enchanting architecture.Tallinn, the capital of Estonia, is a city out of a fairytale with centuries of history and traditions.

programme.title: Church of Nativity, Israel
programme.desc: The Church of The Nativity is situated in Betlehem to the south of Jerusalem.In 327 the church of Nativity was commissioned by Constantine the Great and his mother Helena over the site that was traditionally considered to be located over the cave that mar"&"ks the birthplace of Jesus…

programme.title: Sveti Juraj, Montenegro
programme.desc: Sveti Đorđe Island is one of the two islets off the coast of Perast in the Bay of Kotor, Montenegro. Unlike Gospa od Škrpjela, it is a natural island.

programme.title: Andros Town, Andros Island, Cyclades, Greece
programme.desc: Known for its shipowners, captains, and countless treasures, the Island of Andros has been away from mass tourism for years, which works to its advantage!

programme.title: HOTELS in the Mountains Part 3
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction London in the UK.

programme.title: HOTELS in Singapore Part 1
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction India (part 1)

programme.title: HOTELS in London part 2
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction the Maldives (Part 2)

programme.title: HOTELS in Paris Part 2
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction Paris in France (Part 2)

programme.title: HOTLES in Oman
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction Oman.

programme.title: HOTELS on the French Riviera
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction Macao and Hong Kong.

programme.title: Geared Up
programme.desc: A slow and outdated 1959 Mercedes Benz 180 D is modified with a bargain budget to include new wheels and an American V8 muscle motor.

programme.title: Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Leon is potentially stranded, when Kindness One® suffers a major breakdown in Patna. Later, he fulfills every Englishman's dream in Darjeeling before he travels to Bhutan, to experience “Gross National Happiness” in action.

programme.title: Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Leon and Kindness One® are forced to take the long way around to get to Thailand, but still manage to dive head first into their adventure. In Cambodia, Leon fulfills a childhood dream when he visits the ancient Temple of Angkor Wat.

programme.title: Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: A visit to The Killing Fields of Cambodia is a harsh reminder of humanities darker side. In Ho Chi Minh City, Leon experiences the modernization of Vietnam. And while searching for food, Leon serendipitously meets a woman who opens his eyes.

programme.title: The Armchair Adventurer
programme.desc: Xander and his team travel to Graaff-Reinet, one of the oldest towns in South Africa, to enjoy food, history, and nature, while Adam spends the day searching for fossils in his hometown.

programme.title: The Armchair Adventurer
programme.desc: Xander and his team drive eleven hours to Dullstroom, a quaint town where fishing and drinking prevails. Across the pond, Adam's desire to participate with Xander and his crew takes him all the way to the grocery store.

programme.title: The Armchair Adventurer
programme.desc: On opposite sides of the world, Adam and a member of the South African crew each attempt to conquer their fears.

programme.title: The Travel Bug
programme.desc: From the noise and chaos of Taipei, to the cities in the south west of the country. Here is a more traditional way of life, and a chance to explore more of Taiwan's history before heading into the heart of the nation to see the Alishan mountains.

programme.title: The Travel Bug
programme.desc: The journey starts in Christchurch, before hitting the road to explore the South Island.Four-wheel driving in terrain where Lord of the Rings was filmed, walking on a glacier and learning a little about the Maori culture. It's all in a days' work.

programme.title: The Travel Bug
programme.desc: As far as frontiers go, the Australian Outback is one of the last places on earth where you can really get lost! We take you from what many consider the Galapagos of Australia – Kangaroo Island – and into the water to swim with sea lions and tuna.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Fact or Fiction?
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be testing the effectiveness of driving a vehicle with fully automatic machine guns mounted to the car! Just like 007 did with his Aston Martin DB5.

programme.title: People Are Awesome: Showcase
programme.desc: A strong mind is what helps these artisans control the tools of their trade.

programme.title: People Are Awesome: Showcase
programme.desc: Kicking it into high gear isn't easy, but it's oh-so worth it.

programme.title: Exhibition Awesome
programme.desc: Mind-boggling card tricks and other magic awaits!

programme.title: Exhibition Awesome
programme.desc: You won't believe what these people can do in public!

programme.title: Exhibition Awesome
programme.desc: Contorting all over town is what these folks do best.

programme.title: Exhibition Awesome
programme.desc: Awesome can be found anywhere...even in the wild!

programme.title: Team:Curious
programme.desc: Lacrosse Larry takes aim while Backflip Ben does what he does best!

programme.title: Team:Curious
programme.desc: Potty Mouth gets flushed and High Bar sets one.

programme.title: Team:Curious
programme.desc: Brickbreaker does his thing, while Chairy needs to sit down.

programme.title: Team:Curious
programme.desc: Jack B. Nimble jumps over everything BUT the candlestick, and Split Slide makes a splash.

programme.title: Dance Floor Shorts
programme.desc: These amazing performers do it big, do it right, and do it with style.

programme.title: The E/O
programme.desc: Skateboarder and Street Performer Isiah Hilt, Parkour Athlete Lorena Abreu, Skimboarder Austin Keen, and Triathlete Kasey McCallister are featured.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric treks the canyons and waters of Lake Powell, Utah on foot and via packraft.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric leaves the backcountry to discover urban hiking adventures in the cities of Los Angeles and San Francisco, California.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 1
programme.desc: Canadians Sophie and Anna go on a journey of discovery, luck and love in the Cradle of Liberty, Boston, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 2
programme.desc: Gabby and Jono try their luck in panoramic Salt Lake City, Utah.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 3
programme.desc: Percy and Michelle go on a game of chance in the Emerald city of Seattle.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places To Love: Sonoma, CA
programme.desc: I'm in a destination that is easily considered to be one of the most beautiful in the world. A place of immense natural beauty that helps create a renewed connection to nature. Here's why Sonoma County is a place to love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: There's nothing quite like a destination that knows how to embrace the cold. Samantha loves winter, and she's always looking for places that love it just as much. Join her as she explores the many reasons why Madison, Wisconsin is a Place to Love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: Welcome to Big Sky, Montana! This is a destination that sees 400 inches of powder on average and is home to nearly 6,000 skiable acres. No matter the season or how low the temperatures drops, there's always something inspiring to find if you're curious enough to look. From embracing the snowy outdoors to enjoying the local businesses of a tight knit community, join Samantha as she explores what makes Big Sky a Place to Love.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy dives into a serious beef bonanza with scratch-made meaty ravioli in Delaware, an elevated spin on the French dip in San Diego and beefed-up Middle-Eastern fare in El Paso, Texas.

programme.title: The Main Event
programme.desc: Join hosts Amon Focus and J. Damany Daniel as they dive into the heart of America's oldest Mardi Gras celebration in Mobile, Alabama.

programme.title: Amplify
programme.desc: Singer/songwriter Summer Dean visits her college stomping grounds and discovers it offers more music history than Buddy Holly. Punk rock drummer Phanie Diaz checks out local art in San Antonio and rapper Lou Charles.

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Route 66 is lined with wonderful and informative attractions. Here are just a few of those must-see stops!

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Rest your head after a long day driving Route 66. Check in to these great accommodations along the way!

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: From lobster lovers to badass lobsterwomen, the charming seaside village of Rockland offers something for everyone—especially during the Rockland Lobster Festival, a delightful combination of games, art, and some of the freshest lobster you'll find anywhere.

programme.title: Beach Battles
programme.desc: High-octane dune racing in Winchester Bay, Oregon, plus high-flying Kitefest fun in Long Beach, Washington.

programme.title: Beach Battles
programme.desc: Dive into the fun blowing conchs in Key West, Florida and race pro SUPS in Wrightsville Beach, North Carolina.

programme.title: One Perfect Day in Kentucky
programme.desc: In "One Perfect Day in Kentucky," BFF's Kimberly and Elsa bring their shared competitive streak to the Bluegrass State, facing off to find out who can plan the perfect Kentucky day. Each is determined to delight - and outdo - the other with unforgettable experiences that showcase the state's rich culture. Elsa kicks off the competition with a classic Kentucky breakfast, a recipe she learned from top Chef Ouita Michel at her Holly Hill Cooking Studio. Elsa wins the first point, but Kimberly's ready to up the ante, whisking Elsa away for a thrilling cave kayaking adventure at the Gorge Underground. As they ride the chairlift to the top of the stunning Natural Bridge, the rivalry kicks into high gear and they go head-to-head in a trivia battle. The next surprise – a toast with Kentucky's own Ale-8 soda , sourced by Kimberly straight from the factory only whets their whistles. At the Keeneland Racetrack they sip some spirit forward Keeneland Breezes while Elsa reveals all she has learned about racehorses from a visit to renowned trainer Mark Simms Jr. ‘s horse barn. A Betologist gives them a quick lesson on wagering and Kimberly's horse wins the race. At Louisville's Trouble Bar, Kimberly shares her newfound knowledge of Kentucky bourbon production from a tour and tasting at Castle + Key distillery and makes Elsa One Perfect Drink.
